product.name: Verbatim
product.tagline: A.I. JUST GOT A BULLSHIT METER.
product.description: Chrome extension that pressure-tests AI responses across multiple models via multi-model debate.

primaryHook.text: You don't know what you're missing. Find out before it costs you.

secondaryHook.text: You don't always have someone to push back. AI never does.

bodyCopyOptions: You read the AI's answer. It sounds right. Then a second voice in your head asks if it actually is. Verbatim is the second voice, on demand, before the deliverable goes out.
The AI sounds confident. You aren't, not all the way. One click sends the answer to three other models and shows you exactly where they disagree.
Your reputation is the deliverable. Verbatim pressure-tests every AI conclusion against other models, in one click, before you send it.
Confidence is not correctness. Verbatim is the difference, in one click, without leaving the page.

visualTreatments.name: Clean editorial
visualTreatments.description: White background, single hero quote in large editorial type, Verbatim pink accent, small wordmark.

visualTreatments.name: Bold all-type
visualTreatments.description: Hook text fills the frame, no imagery, high contrast, black on white or white on pink.

visualTreatments.name: Contrarian
visualTreatments.description: Red, black, and white. Aggressive. BULLSHIT METER framing pushed to the front.

visualTreatments.name: Minimal
visualTreatments.description: Lots of whitespace, small wordmark, sub-hook in lowercase, no decoration.

visualTreatments.name: Screenshot mock
visualTreatments.description: Mocked product screenshot of the Debate panel surfacing a real model disagreement.

brand.voice: Direct, adult-to-adult, slightly contrarian. No em dashes. No 'leverage', 'transform', 'revolutionize', or 'AI-powered'.
